title: Anti-AI-Slop Review Aspect (Code + Docs)
summary: Design specification for integrating AI-authorship detection as a review aspect in pr-review orchestrator, with pattern catalogs and agent contract.
notes: Status is Draft for review, not Accepted, so not locked. Clear SPEC structure with pattern definitions (C-n, P-n), agent contract, orchestrator wiring (ACTIVE_ASPECTS variable, dispatch logic), and implementation checklist.
